title: Rename device - Rename with no characters [New]
scenario: Clearing all characters in the device rename field disables the Done button, and pressing Cancel reverts to the old name without saving changes in Device Settings
steps: Tap on a connected Poly device to open Device Settings
Tap on the device name field to edit it
Clear all characters from the device name field
Tap on the device name field again to edit
expected: When all characters are cleared, the "Done" button should be disabled. Pressing "Cancel" should revert to the old name without saving changes. Tapping the device name again should still show the old name.
